KHAS Left Its Mark on Design Turkey Industrial Design Awards

The seventh Design Turkey Industrial Design Awards were held this year and the Department of Industrial Design won many awards.

Prof. Dr. İlhan Erhan was awarded the ‘Design Doyen’ award by the Industrial Designers Professional Organization for his contributions to industrial design education.

Our 2017 graduate Özge Çelebi received the ‘Good Design’ award in conceptual design with her design ‘Growkid’ in the Home Furniture category.

Our 2015 graduates Arda Ülgay and Selim Can Küçükyıldırım received two ‘Good Design’ awards in the Packaging category.

Our 2013 graduate Nurhan Ertogral received the ‘Good Design’ award in the Toy category with her ‘Yapira, Creative Pyramids’ design.

Department of Industrial Design faculty member Assoc. Prof. Dr. Ayşe E. Coşkun served as a member of the Selection Committee at the 2018 Design Turkey Awards.

The award-winning designs can be seen at the Design Week Turkey exhibition area at the Haliç Congress Center this weekend.

https://www.designturkey.org.tr/ana-sayfa
